name: firefox-prototype-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for end-to-end Firefox Smart Window prototyping

plugins.name: prototype
plugins.description: Coordinator that orchestrates the full prototype pipeline: spec, design, build, QA

plugins.name: prototype-spec
plugins.description: PM agent that produces structured prototype specs

plugins.name: prototype-design
plugins.description: UX Designer agent that produces UI specs and Figma designs

plugins.name: prototype-build
plugins.description: Engineer agent that builds prototypes from spec and design

plugins.name: prototype-qa
plugins.description: QA agent that validates prototypes end-to-end via Marionette
